headline.title: Anthropic 公布 Claude 沙箱技术详细文档，提升 AI 安全透明度
headline.summary: Anthropic 发布了一篇关于其 Claude AI 产品（包括 Claude.ai、Claude Code 和 Cowork）中沙箱技术的详细概述，解释了如何通过多种沙箱机制来确保模型安全，为行业提供了宝贵的透明度参考。
headline.title_en: How we contain Claude across products
headline.summary_en: Anthropic published a detailed overview of sandbox techniques used across its Claude AI products (Claude.ai, Claude Code, and Cowork), explaining how multiple sandbox mechanisms ensure model safety, providing valuable transparency for the industry.
headline.reason: 该文章提供了 AI 安全领域罕见的详细实操文档，对于理解前沿模型的生产环境隔离至关重要，且是当日技术社区阅读和讨论的重点。
headline.reason_en: This article provides rare detailed operational documentation in AI safety, crucial for understanding production isolation of frontier models, and was a key focus of technical community reading and discussion.
